hero.title:
Snap It,

hero.description: Scan business cards, whiteboards, menus, contracts with your camera. AI archives and organizes everything. Find anything with natural language.

download.guarantee: Free to download · 200 scans/month · No credit card
download.title: Start Your Second Brain
download.description: Free to download · 200 scans/month · No credit card required

features.title: Camera × AI = Perfect Memory
features.subtitle: Five core features connecting the full loop of capture → understand → retrieve

items.title: Snap to Remember
items.description: Photo triggers OCR + multimodal AI understanding. Auto-tags and archives business cards, whiteboards, documents, menus, receipts.

items.title: Natural Language Search
items.description: Ask "What was on that whiteboard last week?" AI answers in seconds with source images. No more scrolling through photos.
items.advantage: Highlight: RAG vector search for precision

items.title: Multilingual Understanding
items.description: English menus, Japanese signs, Chinese contracts — auto-translated and stored. Works everywhere you travel.

advantages.title: Why MemoLens
advantages.description: Privacy, speed, and intelligence — all three

items.label: Local-First Processing
items.description: OCR happens on your device. Sensitive content never leaves your phone.

items.label: 3-Second Archiving
items.description: From photo to AI analysis in under 3 seconds. 10x more efficient.

items.label: Knowledge Graph
items.description: AI discovers hidden connections between your records, weaving scattered info into a knowledge network.

items.label: Cross-Platform Export
items.description: One-click export to Notion, PDF, or share with teammates.

footer.tagline:
AI-powered camera memory tool.
Never forget what matters.

seo.title: MemoLens - Snap It, Never Forget It
seo.description: Scan business cards, whiteboards, and documents with your camera. AI archives everything. Find anything with natural language.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.highlight: We take your privacy seriously. MemoLens uses a local-first design where OCR runs on your device to maximize privacy.
